# Base Rest Demo

% !!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!
% !! This file is generated by oca-gen-addon-readme !!
% !! changes will be overwritten.                   !!
% !!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!
% !! source digest: sha256:18ada17867ecd6bac566cdc520bf1de09b686d08af09b9675cd595361c050c69
% !!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!

{{ badge1 }} {{ badge2 }} {{ badge3 }} {{ badge4 }} {{ badge5 }}

Demo addon to illustrate how to develop self documented REST services thanks
to the **base_rest** addon.

**Table of contents**

```{contents}
:local: true
```

## Usage

This module provides sample REST services based on base_rest. The documentation
of provided services is available at the `/api-docs` URL. This frontend based
on [Swagger](https://swagger.io/) is generated from the implemented
webservices.

## Known issues / Roadmap

The [roadmap](https://github.com/OCA/rest-framework/issues?q=is%3Aopen+is%3Aissue+label%3Aenhancement)
and [known issues](https://github.com/OCA/rest-framework/issues?q=is%3Aopen+is%3Aissue+label%3Abug) can
be found on GitHub.

## Changelog

### 12.0.2.0.0

- Licence changed from AGPL-3 to LGPL-3

### 12.0.1.0.0

First official version.

## Bug Tracker

Bugs are tracked on [GitHub Issues](https://github.com/OCA/rest-framework/issues).
In case of trouble, please check there if your issue has already been reported.
If you spotted it first, help us to smash it by providing a detailed and welcomed
[feedback](https://github.com/OCA/rest-framework/issues/new?body=module:%20base_rest_demo%0Aversion:%2014.0%0A%0A**Steps%20to%20reproduce**%0A-%20...%0A%0A**Current%20behavior**%0A%0A**Expected%20behavior**).

Do not contact contributors directly about support or help with technical issues.

methods.name: odoo.addons.base_rest_demo.tests.test_openapi.TestOpenAPI._fix_openapi_components
documentation:
Remove additional components that could be added by others addons than
base_rest

methods.name: odoo.addons.base_rest_demo.services.partner_pydantic_services.PartnerNewApiService.search
documentation:
Search for partners
\:param partner_search_param: An instance of partner.search.param
\:return: List of partner.short.info

methods.name: odoo.addons.base_rest_demo.services.partner_pydantic_services.PartnerNewApiService._get
documentation: The following method are 'private' and should be never never NEVER call

methods.name: odoo.addons.base_rest_demo.services.ping_services.PingService.get
documentation:
This method is used to get the information of the object specified
by Id.
The following method are 'public' and can be called from the controller.

methods.name: odoo.addons.base_rest_demo.services.ping_services.PingService.search
documentation:
A search method to illustrate how you can define a complex request.
In the case of the methods 'get' and 'search' the parameters are
passed to the server as the query part of the service URL.

methods.name: odoo.addons.base_rest_demo.services.partner_services.PartnerService.archive
documentation:
Archive the given partner. This method is an empty method, IOW it
don't update the partner. This method is part of the demo data to
illustrate that historically it's not mandatory to defined a schema
describing the content of the response returned by a method.
This kind of definition is DEPRECATED and will no more supported in
the future.
\:param \_id:
\:param params:
\:return:

methods.name: odoo.addons.base_rest_demo.services.partner_services.PartnerService._get
documentation: The following method are 'private' and should be never never NEVER call

methods.name: odoo.addons.base_rest_demo.services.exception_services.ExceptionService.user_error
documentation:
Simulate an odoo.exceptions.UserError
Should be translated into BadRequest with a description into the json
body

methods.name: odoo.addons.base_rest_demo.services.exception_services.ExceptionService.validation_error
documentation:
Simulate an odoo.exceptions.ValidationError
Should be translated into BadRequest with a description into the json
body

methods.name: odoo.addons.base_rest_demo.services.exception_services.ExceptionService.session_expired
documentation:
Simulate an odoo.http.SessionExpiredException
Should be translated into Unauthorized without description into the
json body

methods.name: odoo.addons.base_rest_demo.services.exception_services.ExceptionService.missing_error
documentation:
Simulate an odoo.exceptions.MissingError
Should be translated into NotFound without description into the json
body

methods.name: odoo.addons.base_rest_demo.services.exception_services.ExceptionService.access_error
documentation:
Simulate an odoo.exceptions.AccessError
Should be translated into Forbidden without description into the json
body

methods.name: odoo.addons.base_rest_demo.services.exception_services.ExceptionService.access_denied
documentation:
Simulate an odoo.exceptions.AccessDenied
Should be translated into Forbidden without description into the json
body

methods.name: odoo.addons.base_rest_demo.services.exception_services.ExceptionService.http_exception
documentation:
Simulate an werkzeug.exceptions.MethodNotAllowed
This exception is not by the framework

methods.name: odoo.addons.base_rest_demo.services.exception_services.ExceptionService.bare_exception
documentation:
Simulate a python exception.
Should be translated into InternalServerError without description into
the json body
